rationale: Six of seven dimensions are captured with reasonable fidelity. Industry depth uses broader 'AI/ML' vs seed's specific 'Foundation-model fine-tuning + deployed inference', but captures sector+sub-sector+business model. Geography is precise. Regulatory baseline is partial - DSA/NIS2 show 'llm-hypothesis-only' confidence but user conditionally accepted these in transcript; the capture could be cleaner on provenance. Stakeholders missing 'Head of Trust & Safety' from key partners. Overall solid capture with one notable gap.
specific_gaps: Industry: 'AI/ML' less specific than seed's 'Foundation-model fine-tuning + deployed inference'
Stakeholders: Missing 'Head of Trust & Safety' from key business partners (only VP Engineering and Sales captured)
Regulatory: DSA/NIS2 conditional status not cleanly captured as conditional - shows llm-hypothesis-only confidence despite user confirmation
